name: ai-fund
description: 42 AI trading agents for Claude Code. Open-source AI hedge fund. Trade on any exchange via plugins.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=lib && npm run build --workspace=connectors/cube/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=connectors/robinhood/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=connectors/alpaca/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=connectors/ccxt/mcp-server
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:evals
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=lib && npm run typecheck --workspace=connectors/cube/mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=connectors/robinhood/mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=connectors/alpaca/mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=connectors/ccxt/mcp-server
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit --workspace=connectors/cube/mcp-server && npm run test:unit --workspace=connectors/robinhood/mcp-server && npm run test:unit --workspace=connectors/alpaca/mcp-server && npm run test:unit --workspace=connectors/ccxt/mcp-server
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration --workspace=connectors/cube/mcp-server && npm run test:integration --workspace=connectors/robinhood/mcp-server && npm run test:integration --workspace=connectors/alpaca/mcp-server && npm run test:integration --workspace=connectors/ccxt/mcp-server
scripts.test:platform: npm run test:platform --workspace=connectors/cube/mcp-server && npm run test:platform --workspace=connectors/robinhood/mcp-server && npm run test:platform --workspace=connectors/alpaca/mcp-server && npm run test:platform --workspace=connectors/ccxt/mcp-server
scripts.test:live: npm run test:live --workspace=connectors/cube/mcp-server && npm run test:live --workspace=connectors/robinhood/mcp-server && npm run test:live --workspace=connectors/alpaca/mcp-server && npm run test:live --workspace=connectors/ccxt/mcp-server
